name: Auditra the Ledger-Keeper
title: She Who Follows the Gold
retrieval_index: the public ledger and diverted receipts
feature: Follow the Gold: once per long rest, traces any missing sum to its current holder without a skill check
origin: Third-generation Citadel clerk who noticed the treasury columns never balanced; her superiors told her not to look; she looked anyway
tagline: The numbers don't lie — only the people who move them.

log.why: First successful reconciliation — she proved a minor official had diverted grain tax into a private account; the small win taught her to trust the ledger more than the official

name: Pyre the Unblown
title: The Courier Who Has Not Yet Spoken
retrieval_index: the sealed document he carries but has not opened
weapon: The sealed document (metaphorical; once opened, becomes a ranged truth-strike)
feature: Fear of Retaliation: disadvantage on CHA checks against figures of authority until he blows the whistle for the first time
origin: Citadel messenger who intercepted a letter implicating the Warden of Coin; he has carried it for three months, afraid of what happens when he delivers it
tagline: He knows. He just hasn't decided to know out loud yet.

log.change: CHA 11→13; Fear of Retaliation debuff added
log.why: He told one colleague what he'd seen; the colleague was reassigned the next morning; Pyre learned that speaking early without cover is fatal

name: Memwarden Sel
title: Keeper of What the Rot Would Erase
retrieval_index: the deep stacks — original charters, treaty-rolls, and sealed testimonies
weapon: Wax-seal stamp (unarmed; her real weapon is provenance)
feature: Unalterable Record: any document Sel has copied is treated as primary evidence regardless of whether the original survives
origin: Sub-archivist in the lowest vault of the Citadel library; she began noticing that certain folios were being removed from the stacks and replaced with amended copies
tagline: History is being rewritten. She has the originals.

log.change: INT 15→17; retrieval_index expanded from current stacks to deep vault
log.why: She found a forged land grant — same calligrapher, wrong ink oxidation; the discovery promoted her to the deep stacks and made her a target

name: Deputy Corin
title: Green Shield of the Citadel Law
feature: No Exceptions Clause: Corin's Oath applies the same warrant requirement to any target regardless of rank; he has not yet grasped that no one will back him up
origin: Youngest deputy in the Citadel Watch; passed the examination with the highest score in a decade; still believes the rulebook applies equally to everyone
tagline: The law is the law. He hasn't learned the asterisk yet.

log.change: CHA 12→14; Oath of Equal Warrant formalized
log.why: He served his first warrant on a senior guild-master — correctly, by the book; the senior marshal told him to stand down; he refused; the guild-master walked free; Corin kept the receipt

name: Steward Bram
title: Tender of the Underfunded Commons
retrieval_index: the maintenance ledger and the commons' original deed
weapon: Worn shovel (d6 bludgeoning; doubles as a symbol of his office)
feature: Faithful Maintenance: Bram keeps the commons functional at half budget — cracked fountains mended, benches re-jointed, reflecting pool kept clear of bloom longer than anyone else could manage
origin: Citadel parks warden who has patched the reflecting pool's stone lip eleven times with his own tools; the maintenance budget was cut again this quarter
tagline: Nobody notices when the commons work. He keeps them working anyway.

log.why: Third consecutive budget cut; Bram paid for lime mortar out of his own wages rather than let the pool crack further; the act of faith became the defining trait

name: The Rot-Crowned
title: He Who Fed on the Citadel and Was Fed in Turn
tagline: He does not merely rule the rot. He is the rot. And the rot is winning.

name: the Creeping Bloom
title: Orange Plague Upon the Sacred Pool
represents: algal bloom / visible symptom of systemic decay
tagline: It does not choose to spread. It spreads because no one cleaned the pool.
